description.value: **Benefit:** When using a simple kinetic blast in an area where primal magic is either predominant or very common, you can accept 1 point of burn to cause your blast to become one of the following simple blasts instead. Roll 1d10 to determine the simple blast: 1 = air, 2 = cold, 3 = earth, 4 = electric, 5 = fire, 6 = gravity*, 7 = negative*, 8 = telekinetic, 9 = water, 10 = wood*. You can apply any of your form or substance infusions that are allowed as choices for the random blast, accepting the typical burn cost.
